requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant Controls — R-22 Phasedown and HFC Transition (NAFDAC / Nigeria HCFC Programme)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂管控——R-22淘汰与HFC过渡（NAFDAC / 尼日利亚HCFC计划）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑管控——R-22淘汰與HFC過渡（NAFDAC / 尼日利亞HCFC計劃）

summary.en: Nigeria is a party to the Montreal Protocol and is implementing an HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP) under the Multilateral Fund. R-22 (HCFC-22) is subject to phasedown in Nigeria; import of R-22-charged equipment is being restricted under this programme. NAFDAC (National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control) has oversight over chemical substances including refrigerant imports. Exporters should use low-GWP refrigerants (R-32, R-410A, or other approved alternatives) consistent with Nigeria's HPMP stage; R-22-charged heat pumps face import restrictions.
summary.zh: 尼日利亚是《蒙特利尔议定书》缔约国，正在多边基金支持下实施含氢氯氟烃淘汰管理计划（HPMP）。R-22（HCFC-22）在尼日利亚受淘汰管控；充注R-22的设备进口在该计划框架下受到限制。NAFDAC（国家食品药品管理局）对包括制冷剂进口在内的化学品进行监管。出口商应根据尼日利亚HPMP阶段，使用低GWP制冷剂（R-32、R-410A或其他批准替代品）；充注R-22的热泵面临进口限制。
summary.zht: 尼日利亞是《蒙特利爾議定書》締約國，正在多邊基金支持下實施含氫氯氟烴淘汰管理計劃（HPMP）。R-22（HCFC-22）在尼日利亞受淘汰管控；充注R-22的設備進口在該計劃框架下受到限制。NAFDAC（國家食品藥品管理局）對包括製冷劑進口在內的化學品進行監管。出口商應根據尼日利亞HPMP階段，使用低GWP製冷劑（R-32、R-410A或其他批准替代品）；充注R-22的熱泵面臨進口限制。

standards_or_laws: Montreal Protocol on Substances that Deplete the Ozone Layer (Nigeria as Party)
Nigeria HCFC Phase-out Management Plan (HPMP) — Multilateral Fund
NAFDAC Act — chemical substance import oversight
NIS/IEC 60335-2-40 and NIS/ISO 5149 (refrigerant safety in heat pump systems)

summary.en: China has phased down R-22 under its Montreal Protocol commitments; domestic production and use of R-22 in new equipment is severely restricted. Chinese heat pumps exported are predominantly charged with R-410A or R-32. GB 9237 and GB/T 7725 address refrigerant safety requirements. Current Chinese export units are typically R-32 or R-410A, which is compatible with Nigeria's transition direction.
summary.zh: 中国已依据《蒙特利尔议定书》承诺淘汰R-22；新设备中R-22的国内生产和使用受到严格限制。中国出口热泵主要充注R-410A或R-32。GB 9237和GB/T 7725规定了制冷剂安全要求。当前中国出口设备通常充注R-32或R-410A，与尼日利亚的过渡方向相符。
summary.zht: 中國已依據《蒙特利爾議定書》承諾淘汰R-22；新設備中R-22的國內生產和使用受到嚴格限制。中國出口熱泵主要充注R-410A或R-32。GB 9237和GB/T 7725規定了製冷劑安全要求。當前中國出口設備通常充注R-32或R-410A，與尼日利亞的過渡方向相符。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237 (Refrigerating systems and heat pumps — Safety and environmental requirements)
GB/T 7725 (Room air conditioners — includes refrigerant safety provisions)

gap.en: Units charged with R-22 face import restrictions into Nigeria and must not be exported. R-410A and R-32 units are aligned with Nigeria's transition direction; confirm current NAFDAC import approval requirements for the specific refrigerant used. Refrigerant type, charge quantity, and safety warnings must be clearly labelled on the unit in compliance with NIS standards.
gap.zh: 充注R-22的设备面临进入尼日利亚的进口限制，不得出口。R-410A和R-32设备与尼日利亚的过渡方向相符；须向NAFDAC核实所用特定制冷剂的进口审批要求。制冷剂类型、充注量和安全警告须依据NIS标准在设备上清晰标注。
gap.zht: 充注R-22的設備面臨進入尼日利亞的進口限制，不得出口。R-410A和R-32設備與尼日利亞的過渡方向相符；須向NAFDAC核實所用特定製冷劑的進口審批要求。製冷劑類型、充注量和安全警告須依據NIS標準在設備上清晰標注。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — R-22 import restrictions apply; NAFDAC oversight on refrigerant chemical imports; R-410A/R-32 transition required
mandatory_status.cn: R-22 restricted in new equipment (GB 9237 / HPMP); R-32 and R-410A units comply with China export baseline

source.publisher: National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC), Nigeria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-22-charged units must not be exported to Nigeria due to HPMP phasedown restrictions. R-410A or R-32 units are aligned with Nigeria's transition; confirm NAFDAC import requirements and ensure refrigerant labelling meets NIS standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 充注R-22的设备因HPMP淘汰管控不得出口至尼日利亚。R-410A或R-32设备与尼日利亚过渡方向相符；须确认NAFDAC进口要求，并确保制冷剂标注符合NIS标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 充注R-22的設備因HPMP淘汰管控不得出口至尼日利亞。R-410A或R-32設備與尼日利亞過渡方向相符；須確認NAFDAC進口要求，並確保製冷劑標注符合NIS標準。
